name: vscode-window-flash-notify-relay
description: Relay localhost notifications from remote VS Code workspaces to the local Window Flash Notify UI extension.

commands.title: Window Flash Notify Relay: Copy Curl Command
Window Flash Notify Relay: Test Flash

windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort.description: First port to try when starting the workspace notification HTTP server.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.portSearchRange.description: Number of ports to try, starting from windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.listenHost.description: Host address for the workspace HTTP server. Keep 127.0.0.1 for local-only access from hooks running in the same workspace machine.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.authToken.description: Optional token required in the X-Window-Flash-Token header or token query parameter.

windowFlashNotifyRelay.writePortFile.description: Write .vscode/window-flash-notify-port.json into each workspace folder for scripts to discover the relay server.
